title: fix: catgpt require login, auto-pick model, artist credit
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The cats demand credit
gist.blurb: CatGPT now automatically selects the best model for your account and properly credits artist Tanika Godbole. We also fixed that weird `[object Object]` error, because cats don't speak JavaScript.
gist.summary: Updated the CatGPT app to authenticate users, auto-select between free and premium image models, and integrate artist revenue sharing.
gist.impact: Creators get proper credit and revenue share, while users get automatically routed to the highest quality model their account supports.
gist.visual_concept: CatGPT update focusing on artist credit and model routing. Visuals should include Polly the bee and a cute pixel cat, perhaps with art supplies or a canvas to represent the artist credit, interacting with a retro terminal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, sitting next to a chunky pixel art cat at a glowing retro computer terminal. The screen glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) light, showing a small digital canvas. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, sitting next to a chunky pixel art cat at a glowing retro computer terminal. The screen glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) light, showing a small digital canvas. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background.
